The '''Aggoron''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Many Aggorons were [[Merchant/Legends|traders]], and—along with [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronians]], [[Human/Legends|Humans]], [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]], and [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]]—they formed part of the thousands of non-[[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]] who lived in [[Satikan]], the largest [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Asation]], which was the main trading post and access [[Star system/Legends|system]] to the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]].<ref name="CAV4" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Aggoron were created by [[Timothy S. O'Brien|Timothy O'Brien]] for the article "[[The Gree Enclave]]," which was published in the magazine [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]] in [[November]] [[1995]] by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="J8">{{JournalCite|8|The Gree Enclave}}</ref>
